prestazioni: Engine swap to a Chrysler 2.4L Tigershark MultiAir2 Turbo (EDG) with a forged internals kit from JE Pistons (9.0:1 compression, 87mm bore, 102mm stroke) and Manley H-beam connecting rods, paired with a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing, 58mm compressor inducer) and a custom 3.5" stainless steel intercooler piping system from Vibrant Performance

Full bolt-on fuel system upgrade including a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump, Injector Dynamics ID1000x injectors (1000cc/min), and a Radium Engineering dual catch can setup with -8AN lines to prevent oil buildup in the intake tract under boost

Custom ECU calibration via HP Tuners with a Mopar Performance Stage 2+ turbo camshaft (224°/230° duration, 0.550" lift) and a ported cylinder head by Modern Muscle Xtreme, featuring oversized Ferrea intake/exhaust valves (37mm/32mm) and PAC Racing valve springs for 8,500 RPM stability
estetica: Rocket Bunny V2 widebody kit (Dodge Dart-specific, 3-piece overfenders with carbon fiber front splitter and duckbill rear wing) paired with custom 3M Gloss Black wrap and red pinstriping by Vinyl Frog

Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (Dodge Dart-specific valving, 24-way adjustable compression/rebound, 2.5" front/2.2" rear drop) with Eibach ERS 1000N/mm front and 800N/mm rear springs, mounted on 18x9.5" ET25 BBS LM wheels (gold finish) with Nitto NT05R 255/40R18 tires

Custom interior overhaul featuring Recaro SRD-E bucket seats (Dodge Dart-specific mounting brackets), a Momo Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm diameter, suede grip), and a full Alcantara headliner/door panel retrim by Katzkin, with red contrast stitching and a custom roll cage by Autopower Industries (6-point, TIG-welded 4130 chromoly)
